prestazioni: Replace the factory **TFG (Twin-Fluidic-Gate) 9-speed multi-clutch transmission** with a **Koenigsegg-developed 9-speed 'Light Speed Transmission' (LST) upgrade**, featuring **titanium synchros** and **carbon-fiber clutch plates** to handle the **1,625 hp (E85) / 1,280 hp (95 RON) output** of the **2.0L flat-plane crank twin-turbo V8 (engine code: Jesko TFG V8)** while reducing shift times to **20 milliseconds** via **electro-hydraulic actuation** and **AI-driven predictive gear selection**.

Install a **custom Koenigsegg x Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger setup** with **Inconel 718 turbine wheels**, **ceramic ball bearings**, and **electric wastegate actuators** to eliminate lag and sustain **29 psi of boost** while maintaining **1,800°C turbine inlet temps**. Pair with a **Pectel SQ6M ECU** running **Koenigsegg’s proprietary 'FlexFuel 2.0' algorithm**, optimizing **direct and port injection timing** for **E100, E85, and 98 RON** with **cylinder-specific knock control** and **real-time AFR trimming via 8x Bosch LSU 5.3 wideband sensors**.

Upgrade the **Jesko’s Triplex suspension** with **Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** featuring **3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression)**, **titanium springs (200 N/mm front, 220 N/mm rear)**, and **active ride height adjustment via Koenigsegg’s 'Ghost' hydraulic system**, reducing unsprung mass by **12%** while enabling **0.5g lateral load transfer** during **200+ mph cornering**. Integrate **Brembo GT-R 10-piston calipers** with **carbon-ceramic rotors (420mm front, 395mm rear)** and **AP Racing carbon-carbon pads** for **1.2g deceleration** from **300 km/h** with **zero fade** after **10 consecutive 200-0 km/h stops**.
estetica: Replace the stock **carbon-fiber monocoque** front splitter with a **Koenigsegg x APR Performance 'Attack' aero package**, featuring a **3D-printed titanium underbody diffuser** with **active Gurney flaps** (adjustable via **servo motors** linked to the **LST transmission**) and a **dual-element rear wing** with **carbon-fiber honeycomb core** and **electrochromic DRS (Drag Reduction System)** for **1,400 kg of downforce at 250 km/h**.

Install **Koenigsegg ‘Ghost’ LED headlights** with **adaptive laser high-beams (900m range)**, **thermal imaging night vision**, and **OLED turn signals** integrated into the **carbon-fiber side skirts**, which are **hydro-dipped in a custom 'Aurora Borealis' nano-pigment finish** for **angle-dependent color shifting**. Replace the stock **aluminum door hinges** with **3D-printed titanium units** and **electro-hydraulic actuation** for **scissor-door operation in 0.8 seconds**.

Swap the factory **10-spoke magnesium wheels** for **Dymag CX-10 carbon-fiber wheels** with **titanium center locks**, **aerodynamic vanes**, and **embedded Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35 R20 front, 345/30 R21 rear)** featuring **Koenigsegg’s 'Track & Road' compound** for **1.8g lateral grip** and **200°C heat resistance**. Add **custom 'Jesko Absolut' gold-tinted ceramic coating** with **self-healing nano-resin** to the **carbon-fiber body panels** and **exposed titanium exhaust tips (Inconel 625)** for **scratch resistance** and **thermal reflectivity up to 1,200°C**.
